default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy to resume publishing and prepare for renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Cadence:** To catch up on the publishing pause since Dec 11, the team will now produce 15 articles/week (5 new, 10 revised).](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [**QBR Prep:** For the Feb 25 QBR, Donald will provide blog-to-conversion data (tracked since Jan 10) to demonstrate ROI for the April 17 renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
  - [**Artifact Review:** Donald must review the updated content artifact in Notion to prevent further rework and enable a smooth publishing restart.](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
  - [**Keyword Focus:** The "AI recruiter" keyword reached its highest-ever position (12), while the "AI interviewer" keyword is fluctuating.](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)

## Topics

### Content Production & Strategy

  - [**Problem:** Publishing has been paused since Dec 11 due to multiple artifact updates, creating a backlog of 55 articles needing revision.](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new production cadence of 15 articles/week will resume momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
      - [**5 New Articles:** Prioritized to regain search real estate.](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
      - [**10 Revised Articles:** An easier lift to update with new assets and internal links.](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [**Blocker:** The updated content artifact must be reviewed by Donald to prevent further rework. Carly will post it in Notion today.](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)

### QBR & Renewal Prep

  - [**Event:** A Quarterly Business Review (QBR) is scheduled for Feb 25 with Aaron and Marcel.](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [**Goal:** Demonstrate ROI to support the April 17 contract renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
  - [**Data Requirement:** Carly needs blog-to-conversion data for the QBR deck.](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
      - [**Source:** Donald's internal tracking, live since Jan 10.](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
      - [**Action:** Donald will build and share a report with Carly.](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)

### Performance & Keyword Tracking

  - [**Pillar Performance:** The "Enterprise Recruiting" pillar continues to decline (-20% WoW).](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
      - [**Action:** Carly will research more "recruiting technology comparisons" in Airtable to double down on this high-growth topic.](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [**Keyword Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
      - [**"AI recruiter":** Reached its highest-ever position (12), fluctuating between 12 and 28.](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
      - [**"AI interviewer":** Fluctuating between 14 and 25.](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** Internal linking from revised articles will help stabilize these high-value keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)

### Tooling Update

  - [**Checkthat.ai:** Setup is nearly complete.](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)
      - [**Competitor List:** Updated to focus on key rivals.](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
          - [**Added:** RibbonAI, HeyMilo.ai, usebraintrust.com](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
          - [**Removed:** Merkur](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
      - [**Next:** Carly will add prompts for position/sentiment tracking and schedule a demo for next week.](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carly:**](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
      - [Post updated content artifact in Notion today.](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
      - [Schedule Checkthat.ai demo for next week.](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
      - [Research "recruiting technology comparisons" in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [**Donald:**](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
      - [Review artifact in Notion by tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
      - [Build and share blog-to-conversion report with Carly.](https://fathom.video/share/GGys8DvTekYxycFW5R-xgznXnxMqG6PK?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)

action_items.description: Deliver 10 new articles/wk to Don for approval
Update Notion w/ latest artifact; Slack Don; Don review
Send blog-to-form conversion report to Carly for QBR
Escalate blog revisions; secure editors; share timeline w/ Don
Complete CheckThat setup for Don; schedule walkthrough
Add RibbonAI and HeyMilo.ai to CheckThat; remove Merkur
Find more recruiting tech comparison topics in Airtable
